title: Coilhead | Creaking Replacement
description: Replaces the Creaking with the Coilhead for Lethal Company (with spring physics!)
body:
![Image of the Coilhead behind four employees, with the title "Coilhead Creaking" layered above in orange block-text.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48749e71b2c2ce23623d96d96b6f31ada712f771.png)
### "Sigurd's danger level: 80%; - Scientific name : Vir colligerus"

This resource pack turns the _Creaking_ enemy into the **Coilhead** from **Lethal Company**, complete with spring physics that respond to movement and PBR textures.

All added sound effects are taken from **Lethal Company**, most originally implemented and taken from the "[Creaking Coilhead](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/creaking-coilhead)" resource pack by [Endro](https://modrinth.com/user/endro). The spring physics were implemented based off the video by [t3ssel8r](https://www.youtube.com/@t3ssel8r), "[Giving Personality to Procedural Animations using Math](https://youtu.be/KPoeNZZ6H4s?si=73hcLoEZ9v_AOXvd)". Check out their video for more details!

## Requirements
The pack uses the CEM (Custom Entity Model) file format to replace the Creaking, so either Optifine or the EMF and ETF mods are required to fully function.
